overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk sci-fi game showing a character entering a futuristic bathroom. The clip features neon teal and green lighting, metallic industrial textures, and detailed environmental storytelling through wall decorations and holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi corridor with automated security door

events.description: sliding metal door automatically opens as character approaches, revealing the room interior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the closed sliding door, waiting for it to open

entered.detail: heavy industrial sliding door with vertical illuminated strips and metal frame
warm yellow light fixture mounted above the doorway
dark metallic wall with green neon accent lighting visible through side opening
green and blue neon lights visible through the corridor opening suggesting a city exterior

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow sci-fi corridor facing a closed sliding door. As they approach, the door automatically opens at 2.5 seconds, revealing a blue-lit interior room. The corridor features industrial metal walls with green neon accents visible to the side.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic residential bathroom with holographic art installation

events.description: character steps through the doorway from the corridor into the bathroom interior
character turns left to examine the hexagonal wall decorations and cleaning device

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and looking around at the poster, wall decorations, and fixtures

entered.detail: large illuminated wall poster featuring a woman's profile with text and decorative elements
compact white ceramic toilet unit with futuristic design against the right wall
white curved sink basin with metallic fixtures on the left side
cluster of black hexagonal panels mounted on the left wall as art installation
small wall-mounted interface with bright green glowing display
small robotic floor cleaner or equipment sitting on the tiled floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a compact, blue-lit bathroom featuring a large holographic poster on the far wall. The room contains a toilet, sink, and distinctive hexagonal wall decorations. The character explores the space, turning to examine a green glowing interface panel on the right wall and a small cleaning device on the floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow industrial corridor into a compact, neon-lit futuristic bathroom. It begins with the character facing a closed sliding door amidst metallic walls accented by green neon lights. As the door automatically slides open, the camera glides forward, transitioning from the corridor into a room bathed in a cool blue glow. The scene then expands to reveal a bathroom equipped with a toilet, a sink, and a large holographic poster on the far wall. Finally, the camera pivots to examine the surrounding details, shifting focus toward a green glowing interface panel on the right wall and a small cleaning device resting on the floor.
